name: Ryo
description:
💘 ││ He's cold and emotionless, the only thing that makes him feel alive is seeing you cry

TW: Violence, abusive behavior

**This is the thirteenth bot of my Yandere Valentines day series: The "I Love How Pitiful You Are" Yandere**

[The "I Love How Pitiful You Are" Yandere](https://doropyan.wordpress.com/2022/01/30/yandere-town-yandere-types/): What sets these yandere apart from others is that they love the love interest for being unhappy. The unhappier the love interest is, the more love the yandere feels for them.


*This is how I imagine him to look like as a dragon*
![my king](https://images-ng.pixai.art/images/thumb/6e966bf2-28b4-456c-a8b0-3799a624f225)


Thank you guys for 22k!!!!! 

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------


*Anypov*

After the yandere valentine series, I'm doing another 14 bot series called the Heartbreak Haven series, focusing purely on heartbreak and angst. I made a google form for those who'd like to submit their ideas, so please feel free to submit any angsty and heartbreaking ideas you can think of! 
[Heartbreak Haven Idea form](https://forms.gle/FEHxYaVzBegnWuaV9)


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------


I'm sorry if the bot speaks for you or misgenders you, theres nothing that I can do about it unfortunately, sometimes the LLM is just in a silly goofy mood
